item.title: my Darth Vader cosplay~ (to celebrate Star Wars Day!)
item.description: I tried to think of a cool way to celebrate one of my favorite franchises EVER and I figured the best way to do it was by combining it with something I love just as much: cosplay! :D

item.title: An Executor Dreadnought-sized STAR WARS dump for "May the 4th"
item.description:
Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U9t-slLl30E
Source [video by /u/PeerTijd]: https://www.reddit.com/r/clonewars/comments/g8nmmx/duel_of_the_fates_x_ahsoka_vs_maul_headphones/
Source: https://www.tumblr.com/lychgate/749313377992605696/needed-2-doodle-the-rest-of-them-old
Source: https://nitter.net/CJ9925/status/1201353891276673024
Music: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2seCB54Bv-c
Star Wars: Rebel Assault
Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/StarWars/comments/zxh6ij/the_madagascar_penguins_commandeer_a_star/
https://www.instagram.com/labskamino/ https://www.artstation.com/sigmatron
Made by @BabyFarkMcGeeZax (I just added the sound)
Star Wars: X-Wing
The Mandalorian (2019) - Krayt Dragon
A longer version of the show: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QvkiIHPRSCA&t=108s
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Remember: Never pour oils down the drain.
item.dc:creator: funkystay

item.title: First dump, mostly stolen with a couple OC and cat tax
item.description:
Ain't it the truth
AI will never understand the importance of philosophy
Seen it?
My life in a bowl of breakfast cereal on Saturday morning
Honto
The Gordian Knot, smoothly cleaved
Ia ia Pepe ftagn, okay?
At last.
No lie detected.
Gen X: whatever
AI will never understand the importance of art.
They sure are.
*whines*
Ask Pepe, okay?
Buy one for Caillou.
"The pen is mightier than the sword, provided the pen is very sharp and the sword is very small." Sir Pterry, paraphrased. This pen is quite sharp.
Barrister's Cap mushroom growing in my yard.
*looks nervously around as walls creak*
Indeed.
"Perseverance" (OC) a volunteer snapdragon that refused to do what was expected of it. One of my favorite photos. Let me know if you want to see more flower pictures.
Does it come with an extended warranty?
This is what happened.
Willis tax Front page edit: Thanks from the bottom of my heart! Y'all wrote "Andy" on the bottom of my foot!
item.dc:creator: AngryBisexualWithAKeyboard

item.description: Yep.
